title: × schedolium brinkmannii
side_effects: × schedolium brinkmannii can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions. In severe cases, prolonged use can lead to liver damage, respiratory issues, and cardiovascular problems. Some users may also experience headaches, fatigue, and changes in appetite due to its toxic properties. Improper use or excessive consumption of × schedolium brinkmannii can exacerbate these side effects, emphasizing the need for caution and proper guidance when handling this plant.
